'''dojazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:liberalised|liberalised]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liberalised|liberalised]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dojazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojazhithi|dojazhithi]] || [[word:dojazhiji|dojazhiji]] || [[word:dojazhishi|dojazhishi]] || [[word:dojazhiki|dojazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojazhuthuthu|dojazhuthuthu]] || [[word:dojazhujuju|dojazhujuju]] || [[word:dojazhushushu|dojazhushushu]] || [[word:dojazhukuku|dojazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojazhuthu|dojazhuthu]] || [[word:dojazhuju|dojazhuju]] || [[word:dojazhushu|dojazhushu]] || [[word:dojazhuku|dojazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojazhufthuf|dojazhufthuf]] || [[word:dojazhufjuf|dojazhufjuf]] || [[word:dojazhufshuf|dojazhufshuf]] || [[word:dojazhufkuf|dojazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojazhethe|dojazhethe]] || [[word:dojazheje|dojazheje]] || [[word:dojazheshe|dojazheshe]] || [[word:dojazheke|dojazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojazhothotho|dojazhothotho]] || [[word:dojazhojojo|dojazhojojo]] || [[word:dojazhoshosho|dojazhoshosho]] || [[word:dojazhokoko|dojazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojazhotho|dojazhotho]] || [[word:dojazhojo|dojazhojo]] || [[word:dojazhosho|dojazhosho]] || [[word:dojazhoko|dojazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojazhofthof|dojazhofthof]] || [[word:dojazhofjof|dojazhofjof]] || [[word:dojazhofshof|dojazhofshof]] || [[word:dojazhofkof|dojazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojazhïfthïf|dojazhïfthïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfjïf|dojazhïfjïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfshïf|dojazhïfshïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfkïf|dojazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojazhïfthïfthïf|dojazhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfjïfjïf|dojazhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfshïfshïf|dojazhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfkïfkïf|dojazhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojazhïfthïf|dojazhïfthïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfjïf|dojazhïfjïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfshïf|dojazhïfshïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfkïf|dojazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojazhïfthïf|dojazhïfthïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfjïf|dojazhïfjïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfshïf|dojazhïfshïf]] || [[word:dojazhïfkïf|dojazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojazhæthæ|dojazhæthæ]] || [[word:dojazhæjæ|dojazhæjæ]] || [[word:dojazhæshæ|dojazhæshæ]] || [[word:dojazhækæ|dojazhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojazhathatha|dojazhathatha]] || [[word:dojazhajaja|dojazhajaja]] || [[word:dojazhashasha|dojazhashasha]] || [[word:dojazhakaka|dojazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojazhatha|dojazhatha]] || [[word:dojazhaja|dojazhaja]] || [[word:dojazhasha|dojazhasha]] || [[word:dojazhaka|dojazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojazhafthaf|dojazhafthaf]] || [[word:dojazhafjaf|dojazhafjaf]] || [[word:dojazhafshaf|dojazhafshaf]] || [[word:dojazhafkaf|dojazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dojazhasha|dojazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojazhshësha|dojazhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojazhrosha|dojazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojazhmusha|dojazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojazhyasha|dojazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojazhnkshësha|godojazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojazhnkrosha|godojazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojazhnkmusha|godojazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojazhnkyasha|godojazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dojajazhasha|dojajazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojajazhshësha|dojajazhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojajazhrosha|dojajazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojajazhmusha|dojajazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojajazhyasha|dojajazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojajazhnkshësha|godojajazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojajazhnkrosha|godojajazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojajazhnkmusha|godojajazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojajazhnkyasha|godojajazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dejæzhasha|dejæzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dejæzhshësha|dejæzhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dejæzhrosha|dejæzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dejæzhmusha|dejæzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dejæzhyasha|dejæzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godejæzhnkshësha|godejæzhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godejæzhnkrosha|godejæzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godejæzhnkmusha|godejæzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godejæzhnkyasha|godejæzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dojfazhasha|dojfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojfazhshësha|dojfazhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojfazhrosha|dojfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojfazhmusha|dojfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojfazhyasha|dojfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojfazhnkshësha|godojfazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojfazhnkrosha|godojfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojfazhnkmusha|godojfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojfazhnkyasha|godojfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
